tasks.subject: Task 0: Foundation — tokens + Inter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drop new color/radius/shadow/motion tokens into Tailwind v4 @theme inline, remap shadcn CSS variables, wire Inter via next/font/google.

```json:metadata
{"files":["preorder/app/globals.css","preorder/app/layout.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["@theme exposes forest-* + ink-* + paper + semantic colors","shadcn CSS variables remapped","Inter loaded with weights 400-800","build clean"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```
